title: Charlotte TV Station's Role in CNN's Launch
summary: Before CNN, Ted Turner's gamble on a Charlotte TV station (now WCNC) changed television history.
charlotte_impact: Highlights Charlotte's unexpected role in the creation of a major news network, showcasing local innovation.

title: 'Logan's Law' Proposed After Waxhaw Murder
summary: Lawmakers introduce 'Logan's Law' to track violent offenders after Logan Federico's tragic murder.
charlotte_impact: Addresses systemic failures in tracking violent offenders, potentially preventing future tragedies and improving public safety.

title: Rain and Storms Expected Late Wednesday
summary: Rain and possible storms are forecast for late Wednesday, with cooler temperatures on Friday.

title: Rising Supply Chain Costs Impact Florists

title: Women Accused of Swindling Elderly Men

title: Charlotte Woman Tortured Before Death
